title: Find My Device - User location on the map
scenario: User location on the map should display correctly on both Android and iOS when using Find My Device with headset connected or disconnected
steps: Check user location on the map
Check user location on the map again
On Android: Zoom out and observe the location indicator
On Android: Zoom in and observe the location indicator
On iOS: Zoom out and observe the location indicator
On iOS: Zoom in and observe the location indicator
expected: User location is displayed on the map regardless of headset connection status. On Android: a full blue dot when zoomed out, and a blue circle with a full blue dot in the middle when zoomed in. On iOS: a full blue dot when zoomed out, and a white circle when zoomed in.
